questions.question: Why does chain-of-thought struggle on Game of 24?
questions.questionZh: 为什么思维链（Chain-of-Thought）在24点游戏（Game of 24）上表现不佳？
options: The model cannot multiply integers
A linear walk cannot backtrack when an early step is wrong, so later steps compound the error
The prompt is too short
CoT requires a calculator tool that GPT-4 lacks
optionsZh: 该模型无法执行整数乘法运算。
线性遍历（linear walk）在早期步骤出错时无法回溯（backtrack），因此后续步骤会导致错误不断累积。
提示词 (Prompt) 过短。
思维链 (Chain of Thought, CoT) 需要 GPT-4 所不具备的计算器工具 (calculator tool)。
questions.explanation: Without branching, a wrong early subexpression poisons the rest of the chain; the paper measures only 4 percent for CoT.
questions.explanationZh: 若无分支 (branching) 机制，早期错误的子表达式 (subexpression) 将污染推理链的其余部分；论文测得思维链 (CoT) 的成功率仅为 4%。

questions.question: What is a node in a Tree of Thoughts search?
questions.questionZh: 在思维树（Tree of Thoughts）搜索中，节点（node）是什么？
options: A token produced by the model
A coherent intermediate step or thought, with K possible child expansions
A weight update during fine-tuning
A tool registered with the runtime
optionsZh: 由模型生成的词元 (token)
一个连贯的中间步骤或思考，具有 K 个可能的子节点扩展。
微调（fine-tuning）过程中的权重更新（weight update）
已注册到运行时 (Runtime) 的工具
questions.explanation: ToT treats reasoning as a tree where each node is an intermediate thought that can expand into K children.
questions.explanationZh: 思维树 (Tree of Thoughts, ToT) 将推理过程视为一棵树，其中每个节点代表一个中间思维 (intermediate thought)，并可扩展出 K 个子节点。

questions.question: Which of these three is NOT one of LATS's roles for the LLM?
questions.questionZh: 以下哪一项不属于 LATS 为大语言模型（LLM）设定的角色？
options: Policy that proposes next actions
Value function that scores partial trajectories
Self-reflector that writes reflections on failure
Optimizer that updates model weights between rollouts
optionsZh: 用于建议下一步动作的策略 (Policy)
对部分轨迹（Partial Trajectories）进行评分的价值函数（Value Function）
用于在失败时生成反思记录的自反思器 (Self-reflector)
在 rollout (轨迹采样) 之间更新模型权重 (Model Weights) 的优化器 (Optimizer)
questions.explanation: LATS is gradient-free; the three LLM roles are policy, value, and self-reflector. There are no weight updates.
questions.explanationZh: LATS 采用无梯度 (gradient-free) 机制；三个大语言模型 (LLM) 角色分别为策略 (policy)、价值 (value) 和自反思器 (self-reflector)。该过程不涉及权重更新 (weight updates)。

questions.question: Name the four MCTS phases the lesson lists.
questions.questionZh: 请列出本节课程中提到的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的四个阶段。
options: Sample, Score, Sort, Submit
Select, Expand, Simulate, Backpropagate
Plan, Execute, Reflect, Stop
Search, Synthesize, Synthesize-Again, Stop
optionsZh: 采样 (Sample)、评分 (Score)、排序 (Sort)、提交 (Submit)
选择 (Select)、扩展 (Expand)、模拟 (Simulate)、反向传播 (Backpropagate)
规划、执行、反思、停止
搜索 (Search)、综合 (Synthesize)、再次综合 (Synthesize-Again)、停止 (Stop)
questions.explanation: MCTS proceeds in select, expand, simulate, backpropagate per iteration.
questions.explanationZh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 在每次迭代中依次执行选择 (Select)、扩展 (Expand)、模拟 (Simulate) 和回溯 (Backpropagate) 四个步骤。

questions.question: In UCT, what is the role of the exploration constant c?
questions.questionZh: 在 UCT（Upper Confidence Bound applied to Trees）算法中，探索常数（exploration constant）c 的作用是什么？
options: It scales the value estimate Q
It weights the exploration term sqrt(ln N / n) against the exploitation term Q
It sets the maximum tree depth
It controls the number of rollouts
optionsZh: 它对价值估计 (Value Estimate) Q 进行缩放。
它在探索项 (exploration term) sqrt(ln N / n) 与利用项 (exploitation term) Q 之间进行权衡。
它用于设置最大树深度（Maximum Tree Depth）。
它控制采样（rollout）的数量。
questions.explanation: c balances exploitation (Q) against the exploration term; tune per task.
questions.explanationZh: `c` 用于权衡利用（Exploitation，即 Q）与探索项（Exploration term）；请根据具体任务进行调优。

questions.question: When is search actively harmful compared to a single trajectory?
questions.questionZh: 与单条轨迹（Single Trajectory）相比，搜索（Search）在什么情况下反而有害？
options: When the evaluator is noisy and there is a single right answer, so the search converges on a good-scoring wrong answer
When the task involves multiple correct answers
Whenever tokens are cheap
When the task is code generation
optionsZh: 当评估器（evaluator）存在噪声且仅有一个正确答案时，搜索（search）过程便会收敛于一个得分较高但错误的答案。
当任务涉及多个正确答案时
当词元 (tokens) 成本较低时
当任务为代码生成 (Code Generation) 时
questions.explanation: A noisy value function plus a single correct answer is exactly when search overfits to the noise.
questions.explanationZh: 当价值函数（value function）存在噪声且仅有一个正确答案时，正是搜索（search）对噪声产生过拟合（overfit）的典型情况。

questions.question: Roughly how much more token usage should you budget for ToT on Game of 24 compared with CoT?
questions.questionZh: 与思维链（Chain of Thought）相比，在24点游戏（Game of 24）上使用思维树（Tree of Thoughts）时，大约需要多预留多少 Token 使用量？
options: About 2x
About 10x
Less than CoT because of pruning
optionsZh: About 2x
About 10x
因剪枝（Pruning）而低于思维链（Chain of Thought）
questions.explanation: The lesson cites 100-1000x token cost for ToT on Game of 24 versus CoT.
questions.explanationZh: 该课程指出，在24点游戏（Game of 24）中，思维树（Tree of Thoughts, ToT）的 token 成本是思维链（Chain of Thought, CoT）的 100 至 1000 倍。
